Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 112 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Turing Award Honors Bennett and Brassard for Quantum Information Science 44 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Lent and Lisp 63 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 113 upvotes, 12 comments
  5. Attention Residuals 186 upvotes, 25 comments
  6. Mamba-3 158 upvotes, 23 comments
  7. Ghostling 238 upvotes, 43 comments
  8. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 87 upvotes, 13 comments
  9. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 765 upvotes, 267 comments
  10. Atuin v18.13 – better search, a PTY proxy, and AI for your shell 33 upvotes, 7 comments
  11. VisiCalc Reconstructed 212 upvotes, 79 comments
  12. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 889 upvotes, 414 comments
  13. Molly Guard 124 upvotes, 50 comments
  14. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 370 upvotes, 180 comments
  15. Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone 76 upvotes, 30 comments
  16. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 201 upvotes, 97 comments
  17. An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video] 65 upvotes, 26 comments
  18. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. We give every user SQL access to a shared ClickHouse cluster 15 upvotes, 3 comments
  20. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 152 upvotes, 75 comments
  21. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 93 upvotes, 47 comments
  22. We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster 234 upvotes, 143 comments
  23. Padel Chess – tactical simulator for padel 40 upvotes, 19 comments
  24. The Ugliest Airplane: An Appreciation 78 upvotes, 45 comments
  25. Cryptography in Home Entertainment (2004) 53 upvotes, 31 comments
  26. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 579 upvotes, 470 comments
  27. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 302 upvotes, 239 comments
  28. Why One Key Shouldn't Rule Them All: Threshold Signatures for the Rest of Us 12 upvotes, 7 comments
  29. The Story of Marina Abramovic and Ulay (2020) 7 upvotes, 3 comments
  30. Our commitment to Windows quality 549 upvotes, 988 comments

Last generated 8:30pm, 21 March 2026. Source here.
